items.raw_excerpt: El pequeño municipio conserva el último horno moruno operativo y presenta uno de los sistemas hidráulicos más sofisticados del Mediterráneo.
items.summary_en: Potries is a small town in Valencia. It keeps the last working Moorish oven in the area and has a very advanced old water system. The town wants to use this heritage to seek the European Capital of Culture title.
items.summary_ko: 발렌시아의 작은 마을 포트리에스는 아직 운영되는 마지막 무어식 가마를 보존하고 있다. 이곳에는 지중해권에서도 정교한 옛 수리 시스템이 남아 있다. 마을은 도자기와 물, 예술 유산을 바탕으로 유럽 문화 수도에 도전하려 한다.
items.title_en: Potries turns pottery, water, and art into a culture bid
items.title_ko: 포트리에스, 도자기와 물의 유산으로 문화 수도를 꿈꾸다
items.title_original: Potries, el pueblo de Valencia que busca convertir su legado de cerámica, agua y arte en Capital Europea de la Cultura - Viajes National Geographic

items.raw_excerpt: Hace un año se llevó el sitio como La Mejor Ciudad de Latinoamérica, hoy es la mejor del mundo en el Travel+Leisure World’s Best Awards 2017.
items.summary_en: Travel+Leisure named San Miguel de Allende the best city in the world in its 2017 World's Best Awards. Oaxaca also ranked high, taking sixth place on the list.

items.raw_excerpt: A estação pluviométrica do Sistema Alerta Rio na região anotou, das 12h de segunda-feira (15) até a tarde desta terça-feira (16), 254,6 milímetros (mm) de chuva. Tal volume é 146,1 mm superior à média para junho (108,5 mm).
items.summary_en: A rain gauge in Rocinha recorded 254.6 mm of rain from Monday noon to Tuesday afternoon. That was more than twice the usual June average of 108.5 mm.
items.summary_ko: 리우데자네이루 호시냐 지역의 우량계가 월요일 정오부터 화요일 오후까지 254.6mm의 비를 기록했다. 이는 6월 평균인 108.5mm의 두 배를 넘는 양이다.
items.title_en: Rocinha Rain Was More Than Twice the June Average

items.raw_excerpt: Located at Plaza Singapura, the lifestyle store sells lifestyle products such as keychains, bags, pouches, apparel and jewellery, and will operate till November this year.
items.summary_en: Singapore's first White Rabbit-themed pop-up store has opened at Plaza Singapura. The shop sells items like keychains, bags, pouches, clothes, and jewellery, and will run until November this year.

items.raw_excerpt: This quaint, waterfront village in Ontario is just the place to hit the brakes and relax. Here’s what to know about Lakefield.
items.summary_en: Lakefield is a small waterfront village in Ontario. It has a historic downtown and scenic winding roads nearby. The village is presented as a calm place to slow down and relax.
